news.headline: Construction begins for UK battery energy storage project by EDP.
Diebold Nixdorf begins offer of $950.0 million senior secured notes due 2030.
news.summary: In North Canton, Ohio on December 10, 2024, Diebold Nixdorf, Incorporated (NYSE: DBD) started a Notes Offering, proposing $950.0 million in total principal amount for senior secured notes set to mature in 2030. The offering aims to raise funds through the issuance of these Notes.

news.headline: AVAIO Digital to invest $3 billion in data center campus on 452 acres in VA, with 300 MW green power; big economic boost.
news.summary: AVAIO Digital, a company based in Stamford, Connecticut, has announced its intention to develop a sustainable data center campus in Appomattox County, Virginia. The project is slated to cost $3 billion and will boast 300 megawatts of green power capacity. This initiative is expected to have a considerable economic impact on the region.

news.headline: Orthogon Therapeutics raises $5.2M, surpassing $5M target, total funding now over $25M; will advance oral therapy for BK Polyomavirus.
news.summary: Orthogon Therapeutics, based in Canton, Massachusetts, has recently completed a successful financing round, surpassing its initial target of $5 million. The oversubscribed round has brought in over $25 million in total funding for the company. The additional funding will be instrumental in advancing the development of its innovative antiviral medications, specifically designed to address BK virus reactivation in transplant recipients. Orthogon Therapeutics has made significant progress in creating small molecule drugs that specifically target vital viral proteins crucial to the life cycle of the polyomavirus.

news.headline: Brazil's annual inflation accelerates before interest rate decision.
Stephanie Apostolou elected Chief Legal & Sustainability Officer at Koppers Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KOP). Expanded role covers sustainability, risk management, strategic planning.
news.summary: Koppers Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KOP) is broadening its scope to include overseeing sustainability, zero harm initiatives, risk management, and strategic planning. The company, headquartered in Pittsburgh, made this announcement on December 10, 2024. Koppers Holdings Inc. is a leading global supplier of treated wood products, wood treatment chemicals, and carbon-based products.

news.headline: EU advises members not to give the UK more energy market access - FT.
Great Quest Gold finds 18 drilling targets at Belmont Prospect in Namibia; Dr. David Shaw resigns from board.
news.summary: Great Quest Gold Ltd. (TSX-V: GQ) shared an update on the Belmont prospect, revealing the identification of 18 individual targets in Namibia through a mix of surface geochemistry, geophysics, and geological mapping. These targets will be the focus of an upcoming drilling campaign. Additionally, the Company announced the resignation of Dr. David Shaw from its Board of Directors.

news.headline: Odometer fraud on the rise nationwide, 2.14 million affected vehicles, up by 18% since 2021, costs buyers thousands.
news.summary: The cost of used cars has surged by over 18% since 2021, leading to unsuspecting buyers losing out on thousands of dollars. According to recent data from CARFAX, odometer fraud continues to be a prevalent concern nationwide. Reports indicate that potentially over 2.14 million vehicles currently in operation could be affected by this deceitful practice.

news.headline: Threekit launches AI Visual Configurator for product configuration, benefits companies like A-dec. - a global dental equipment manufacturer.
news.summary: A-dec, a prominent company in dental equipment manufacturing, is one of the customers utilizing the newest AI release for enhancing product visualization experiences. The announcement of the latest AI release was made by Threekit, a leading visual commerce company based in Chicago, on December 10, 2024. This technology advancement aims to offer more engaging product visualization experiences for businesses and customers alike.

news.headline: Charter Air Direct introduces new roundtrip route connecting Anguilla and San Juan, Puerto Rico.
news.summary: In Anguilla, a British Overseas Territory, on December 10, 2024, Charter Air Direct revealed a recent development in their services, showcasing a newly established jet charter air service in partnership with Freedom II Bermuda Limited ("Freedom II Bermuda"). Among the highlights was the inauguration of the first charter flight route connecting the secluded island of Anguilla with the vibrant city of San Juan in Puerto Rico.

news.headline: First dataset of Olverembatinib with Lisaftoclax shows benefits for children with R/R Ph+ ALL at ASH 2024.
news.summary: Today, Ascentage Pharma, a biopharmaceutical company with a focus on developing therapies for cancer treatment, revealed a significant update. The company, traded as 6855.HK, operates on a global scale and is dedicated to addressing critical medical needs, particularly in the field of malignancies. The announcement was made from Rockville, Md. and Suzhou, China on Dec. 10, 2024.

news.headline: Boats, cables, and oil installations vulnerable as "gray zone" targets on the rise, multiple reports show.
Holiday debt lasts until mid-2025, survey reveals. Consumers spend $2,000+ on average this season, causing stress and anxiety.
news.summary: In San Mateo, California, on December 10, 2024, it was reported that consumers are anticipating financial challenges in the year 2024. The high costs associated with holiday spending have led to feelings of stress and anxiety for many individuals. On average, Americans are expected to spend more than $2,000 during this holiday season.

news.headline: Laser Photonics Corp. focuses on PCB marking for electronics and semiconductors, investing in R&D.
news.summary: Laser Photonics Corporation, a key player in industrial laser systems (NASDAQ: LASE), and its subsidiary Control Micro Systems, Inc., revealed an advance in their Printed Circuit Board (PCB) Marking technology program. This initiative aims at the semiconductor and electronics sector, where laser marking is crucial. The semiconductor market is anticipated to witness significant growth, with LPC and CMS focusing on enhancing their offerings in this arena.

news.headline: Red Rover Health receives SOC 2 Type 2 Certification for healthcare integration platform, meeting trusted services criteria.
news.summary: An independent audit has confirmed that Red Rover Health's healthcare integration platform, which allows healthcare providers to incorporate top-tier third-party solutions, meets the trusted services criteria. The certification was announced in Des Moines, Iowa on December 10, 2024. This recognition highlights the platform's capabilities to ensure efficient integration of diverse healthcare applications.

news.headline: DocGo's Ambulnz subsidiary renews 2-year contract with major TN healthcare system, building on 6-year partnership.
news.summary: In New York, DocGo Inc. (Nasdaq: DCGO) disclosed today that its Ambulnz subsidiary has officially renewed its contract with a prominent healthcare system in Tennessee for two years. This extension, following a successful six-year alliance, underscores the Company's reputation for providing effective and top-notch mobile health services. As per the renewed deal, Ambulnz by DocGo will persist in offering their trustworthy medical transportation services to the healthcare system in Tennessee.

news.headline: Eric Trump believes Bitcoin will reach $1 million and is optimistic about its scarcity, expecting widespread acceptance.
news.summary: Eric Trump stated that a significant number of governments and institutions are expected to embrace Bitcoin in the future, emphasizing that those who get involved early are likely to benefit the most.

news.headline: FDA grants Breakthrough Device Designation to MeMed Severity Test for suspected sepsis, aiding clinicians with insights for improved patient outcomes.
news.summary: A recent development in the medical field has been announced in Andover, Massachusetts and Haifa, Israel. The new designation aims to enhance the treatment of acute infections and sepsis by providing clinicians with prompt insights to improve patient outcomes significantly.

news.headline: Peter Schiff wants US to sell seized BTC to reduce deficit, calling for end to talk of 'Strategic' Bitcoin Reserve.
news.summary: He mentioned that the earnings would help lower the budget shortfall and eliminate any speculation about establishing a potentially damaging 'Strategic' Bitcoin Reserve.

news.headline: Ollie's reports Q3 2024 financial results:- Net Sales up 7.8% to $517.4M- Earnings per Share up 13.7% to $0.58- Opened Record 24 new stores- Operating income up 14.0%
news.summary: Ollie's Bargain Outlet Holdings, Inc. reported strong financial results for the third quarter ended November 2, 2024. Net sales increased by 7.8% to $517.4 million, with earnings per share rising by 13.7% to $0.58. The company opened a record 24 new stores this quarter, ending with a total of 546 stores in 31 states. Operating income increased by 14.0% to $44.5 million, and net income increased by 12.8% to $35.9 million. Adjusted EBITDA increased by 17.0% to $59.8 million. Gross margin increased by 100 basis points to 41.4%. The Company's cash and cash equivalents were $303.9 million. Ollie's provided its outlook for fiscal 2024 and discussed acquiring store locations from Big Lots bankruptcy proceedings. The quarterly results are a testimony to the company's growth and financial stability, positioning it well for the future.

news.headline: Global peripheral spondyloarthritis market estimated to reach US$ 5,220.7 million by 2034, growing at 6.8% CAGR. Key players include AbbVie, Novartis, Pfizer, UCB Pharma. TNF inhibitors and biologics are primary drivers of market expansion. JAK inhibitors show potential for further growth. Population growth and emerging markets contribute to rising demand.
news.summary: The global peripheral spondyloarthritis market is estimated to reach US$2,704.0 million in 2024, with a projected CAGR of 6.8% from 2024 to 2034. Biologic and targeted therapies like TNF inhibitors have greatly improved patient outcomes, with medications like etanercept and infliximab leading the way. In addition, newer medications such as ixekizumab and secukinumab, IL-17 inhibitors, provide alternative treatment options. JAK inhibitors are another family of targeted medicines gaining popularity, especially for patients preferring non-injectable therapy. The market is expected to reach US$5,220.7 million by 2034, showing an absolute $ opportunity of US$2,516.6 million. Key players in the market include AbbVie, Novartis, Pfizer, and others. The availability of biosimilars is also expected to increase due to cost reductions. North America is anticipated to hold a sizeable market share by 2034.

news.headline: Erdene secures $50 million working capital facility with TDB for Bayan Khundii Gold Project in Mongolia. Warrant exercises also on the rise.
news.summary: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, on December 10, 2024, Erdene Resource Development Corp. (TSX:ERD; MSE:ERDN) has announced the establishment of a working capital facility worth up to US$50 million with Trade and Development Bank of Mongolia (“TDB”) by Erdene Mongol LLC (“EM”). This funding is designated for the commissioning and ramp-up of the high-grade, open-pit Bayan Khundii Gold Project (“Bayan Khundii”, “BK” or "Project") in partnership with Mongolian Mining Corporation (“MMC”). Additionally, the Company has updated on recent warrant exercises.

news.headline: Nayax now allows Discover® Global Network cardholders to use their payment method in EMEA regions.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, a notable decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. This decrease marks a significant improvement in the job market, with a total of 250,000 new jobs being added last month alone. The manufacturing sector saw the most growth, adding 50,000 new jobs. Additionally, the average hourly wage increased by 2.5% compared to last year. Despite these positive trends, there are still concerns about the overall economic recovery and the ongoing impact of the global pandemic.

news.headline: ZenaTech gets LOI for second land survey acquisition in US; aims to disrupt $10.3 billion industry with AI drones.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, ZenaTech, Inc. disclosed their plan to acquire a second land survey company by signing a Letter of Intent (LOI). ZenaTech, known for AI drone and enterprise SaaS solutions, aims to revolutionize the land survey industry and beyond by leveraging AI drones for increased innovation, efficiency, and accuracy. The newly established agreement is with a reputable land survey engineering firm in the Southern US region, following a previous acquisition announcement in the Southeast US area. This strategic move aligns with ZenaTech's goal to expand its Drone-as-a-Service (DaaS) business in the United States and strengthens its position in the market. The company's stocks are listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ZENA and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange as 49Q.

news.headline: Alaska Energy Metals discovers mineralization extends 1.8km SE at Nikolai Project, Alaska.
VR Resources confirms mafic-ultramafic intrusion with magmatic sulfide in first two drillholes at Ontario's Empire Project, marking proof of concept.
news.summary: The initial drilling at the Empire project has confirmed the presence of significant mafic-ultramafic intrusions, based on findings from the first two holes. This marks a crucial proof of concept for the site.

news.headline: Bombardier to redeem US$300 million of 7.875% Senior Notes due 2027 on Jan 9, 2025 at 100% principal + interest.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Bombardier Inc. declared a partial redemption for $300 million of its 7.875% Senior Notes due 2027. The redemption, set for January 9, 2025, will be funded through cash from the company's balance sheet. The redemption price for the 2027 Notes will be 100.00% of the principal amount, along with accrued and unpaid interest.

news.headline: LAVA Therapeutics N.V. reports Q3 2024 financial results, extends cash runway into 2027 with pipeline reprioritization.
news.summary: LAVA Therapeutics N.V., based in Utrecht, The Netherlands, and Philadelphia, announced its financial results for the third quarter ending September 30, 2024. The clinical-stage immuno-oncology company, trading on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol LVTX, specializes in developing bispecific gamma delta T cell engagers through its Gammabody® platform. Alongside the financial report, the company revealed a strategic pipeline reprioritization.

news.headline: HPQ Silicon signs MOU with company in Northern Germany on Nov 24, 2024. The German company has over 50 years of experience.
news.summary: In Montreal on December 10, 2024, HPQ Silicon Inc. announced signing a Memorandum of Understanding on November 24, 2024, with a Northern Germany-based company. HPQ, traded on TSX-V as HPQ, OTCQB as HPQFF, and on FRA as O08, specializes in silica and silicon-based materials. The German company, with over 50 years of experience in chemical/industrial manufacturing, owns an industrial site.

news.headline: Psyence Biomed signs agreement with Optimi Health Corp for exclusive supply of psilocybin for Palliative Care.
news.summary: Psyence Biomed has recently secured exclusive global supply rights to Optimi’s GMP-certified psilocybin, derived from nature. This agreement enables Psyence Biomed to utilize the substance for their drug development and commercialization efforts in the field of Palliative Care. The deal signifies a significant step for Psyence Biomed, as they gain access to high-quality psilocybin for their initiatives. This exclusive arrangement positions them strategically in advancing their projects with Optimi’s product, ensuring quality and consistency in their endeavors related to Palliative Care.

news.headline: Saia Inc. boosts borrowing capacity from $300M to $600M, extending maturity to Dec 2029.
news.summary: Saia, Inc., a top transportation provider, recently shared that it has finalized an amendment to its unsecured revolving credit facility in Johns Creek, Georgia. The company, known for its national services like less-than-truckload (LTL), non-asset truckload, expedited deliveries, and logistics solutions, confirmed the increase of its borrowing capacity from $300 million to $600 million through this amendment. Moreover, the maturity of the current credit facility has been extended until December 2029.

news.headline: Ocular Therapeutix to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 13-16, 2025 in San Francisco, CA. (100 chars)
news.summary: In Bedford, Massachusetts on December 10, 2024, Ocular Therapeutix, Inc. (NASDAQ: OCUL), a biopharmaceutical firm dedicated to enhancing vision by creating and marketing revolutionary treatments for retinal diseases and eye conditions, revealed plans to participate in the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference from January 13-16, 2025 in San Francisco, CA.

news.headline: New addition to Chameleon Discovery family: Discovery LX Laser launched by Coherent. Broadening range of options for researchers.
Lindblad Expeditions Holdings appoints Natalya Leahy as CEO and Rick Goldberg as CFO, with founder Sven-Olof Lindblad becoming Co-Chair of Board.
news.summary: Sven-Olof Lindblad, the Founder and CEO of Lindblad Expeditions Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: LIND), will now also serve as Co-Chair of the Board. Additionally, Dyson Dryden, the current Interim CFO, will retain his position as a Board Director. The announcement was made on December 10, 2024, in New York. Lindblad Expeditions is recognized as a prominent player in the expedition industry.

news.headline: LOG Pharma Primary Packaging to debut eco-friendly barrier bottle at Pharmapack Europe 2025. Reduces costs and optimizes oxygen scavenging. Israel-based company aims to promote sustainable practices in pharmaceutical packaging. #PharmapackEurope2025 #ecofriendly
news.summary: A new product line has been introduced by LOG Pharma Primary Packaging, a top global provider of packaging solutions for the pharmaceutical sector based in ASHDOT YA'ACOV ICHUD, Israel. Launched on Dec. 10, 2024, this line aims to reduce expenses while enhancing oxygen scavenging capabilities in an eco-friendly barrier bottle. The company is set to exhibit the new product at an upcoming event.

news.headline: AllianceBernstein introduces two new Buffer ETFs, expanding its suite to 17. Announced on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: AllianceBernstein Holding L.P. (NYSE: AB), a prominent global investment management firm, has recently introduced two new additions to their ETF suite, bringing the total number of ETFs offered to 17. The newly launched products include the AB International Buffer ETF and the AB Moderate Buffer ETF. This unveiling was made public on December 10, 2024, in Nashville, Tennessee.

news.headline: DeFi Tech to acquire 10% stake in Swiss firm Neuronomics AG specializing in AI-driven trading strategies, expanding asset management.
news.summary: DeFi Technologies has recently entered into a Letter of Intent (LOI) to secure a 10% ownership in Neuronomics AG, a Swiss-based asset management company renowned for its expertise in AI-powered quantitative trading tactics. This move signifies DeFi Technologies' strategic venture into enhancing its presence in asset management and trading sectors. The acquisition demonstrates the company's intention to expand its influence in the industry.

news.headline: Endo launches Doxycycline for Injection, USP 100 mg/vial, an AP-rated version. Expanding options for healthcare providers.
news.summary: Malvern-based Endo, Inc. (OTCQX: NDOI) revealed on December 10, 2024, that the company has commenced the distribution of doxycycline for injection, USP in 100 mg/vial dosage. This product serves as an AP-rated alternative to DOXY 100™. The move aims to offer healthcare providers and hospital pharmacies a wider range of options.

news.headline: Alphyn secures US patent for Zabalafin Hydrogel treatment for Atopic Dermatitis on Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: A recently granted patent in Annapolis, Maryland on December 10, 2024 covers the compositions and methods of use of a drug formulation for Zabalafin Hydrogel. Alphyn, a clinical-stage dermatology company, is behind the development of this first-in-class Multi-Target Therapeutics®. The U.S. Patent and Trademark office has officially approved this patent, marking a significant milestone for the company.

news.headline: CME Group sets 2025 annual meeting on May 8, 2025 at 10:00 a.m. CT. News released on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago, on December 10, 2024, the leading derivatives marketplace, CME Group, disclosed plans to hold its 2025 annual shareholder meeting at 10:00 a.m. Central Time on May 8, 2025. Further details regarding the meeting will be available in the company's proxy statement.

news.headline: Callan's 2024 study examines fees for 144 real assets partnerships.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 10, 2024 in San Francisco, a prominent institutional investment consulting firm, Callan, unveiled the findings of its inaugural 2024 Real Assets Open-End Funds Fees and Terms Study. This comprehensive study delves into the examination of 144 real assets partnerships which encompass a diverse range of fund offerings within the realm of real estate.

news.headline: Virax Biolabs partners with Tebubio to distribute ImmuneSelect in EU, Norway, and Switzerland. Expanding reach.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Virax Biolabs Group Limited (NASDAQ: VRAX) revealed it is a biotechnology firm concentrating on immune response identification and viral disease diagnosis. The company recently engaged in a non-exclusive partnership.

news.headline: US Dept of Defense partners with Movius for secure comms, listed in FedRAMP with DoD agency, awarded multiple Phase II SBIR contracts.
news.summary: A company based in Fremont, California, Movius, has recently been included in the FedRAMP marketplace in partnership with a Department of Defense sponsored agency. This collaboration aims to deliver secure communication solutions for critical missions. Movius has secured numerous Phase II Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) contracts via AFWERX, Tactical Funding Increase. For more information, visit their listing on the FedRAMP marketplace at https://marketplace.fedramp.gov/products/FR2335850270.

news.headline: Stamford WPCA transitions to KUBRA EZ-PAY for streamlined payments with more speed and security.
news.summary: KUBRA proudly reveals that the City of Stamford WPCA has transitioned to KUBRA EZ-PAY® in Tempe, Arizona. This change signifies a significant advancement in on-demand payment solutions, showcasing an innovative approach to convenient payment processing.

news.headline: Redwire receives $45M contract from AFRL for space-based technologies development, supporting warfighters.
news.summary: A Florida-based company, Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW), specializing in space infrastructure, has secured a significant contract worth $45,469,600 from the Air Force Research Laboratory (AFRL) Space Vehicles Directorate. This five-year cost-plus-fixed-fee contract is set to be incrementally funded and focuses on the creation, assessment, and testing of prototype software and hardware for crucial mission technologies. The award aims to aid the AFRL Space Vehicles Directorate in advancing their initiatives.

news.headline: Bayport Management Ltd reveals record date and exchange date for senior and subordinated social bonds swap.
news.summary: Bayport Management Ltd has disclosed the important dates concerning the exchange of its senior and subordinated social bonds. The company has set the record date as well as the exchange date for this transaction. This announcement marks a significant step in the financial operations of Bayport Management Ltd. Investors holding these bonds should take note of the announced dates to ensure a smooth exchange process. This development comes as part of the company's strategic financial management plan.

news.headline: Stock market plunged significantly, recording its largest single-day loss in 2021. Concerns rise among investors.

Happy Munkey partners with BLAZE for dispensary tech in Manhattan and Brooklyn, creating seamless shopping experience. LOS ANGELES, Dec. 10, 2024 /PRNewswire - BLAZE Solutions, Inc. is a leader in cannabis retail technology.
news.summary: A software ecosystem called BLAZE has been developed to enhance the shopping experience across physical stores and online platforms, emphasizing culture and community. On December 10, 2024, BLAZE® Solutions, Inc., a leading company in cannabis retail technology, announced the launch of the ecosystem. This innovation aims to create a seamless experience for customers, bridging the gap between in-store and online shopping. By focusing on culture and community, BLAZE is set to revolutionize the cannabis retail sector and bolster customer engagement.

news.headline: Cooper Parry partners with Lee Equity to drive growth; UK's professional services group secures majority investment.
news.summary: Today, Cooper Parry ("CP"), a prominent provider of accounting and business advisory services in the UK, disclosed that it has secured a majority investment from funds managed by Lee Equity Partners, LLC ("Lee Equity"). This new strategic partnership signifies a significant development for CP, signaling a strong vote of confidence in the company's operations. Lee Equity's investment underscores a strategic alignment with CP's goals and vision for growth. This investment is expected to provide CP with valuable resources and support to further expand its services and client base.
